<!--
Update this file before publishing when you want branch-specific lead-in notes.
GitHub Actions prepends this Markdown above GitHub-generated release notes.
-->

## Highlights

- Added native local streaming and live-output controls, with safer cancellation and stale-result handling across transcription sessions.
- Expanded the local model catalog with release dates, capability details, improved filtering, clearer download state, and corrected Moonshine metadata.
- Improved model download cancellation, onboarding feedback, custom-word handling, and profile synchronization.
- Reduced microphone startup latency and improved Unicode VAD resource handling.
- Improved Windows reliability with mixed-DPI overlay placement, tray-icon contrast fixes, and app-local VC runtime support.

---

This is a specialized build for the Microsoft Store Edition. It has auto-updates disabled and includes Store-specific branding.

**Notice:**
This branch remains the recommended fallback if the standard Windows build crashes on an older CPU during transcription.
